C:\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-14.2.0-llvm-19.1.7-mingw-w64ucrt-12.0.0-r3\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\lab_1.dir/objects.a
C:\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-14.2.0-llvm-19.1.7-mingw-w64ucrt-12.0.0-r3\mingw64\bin\llvm-ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\lab_1.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\lab_1.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-14.2.0-llvm-19.1.7-mingw-w64ucrt-12.0.0-r3\mingw64\bin\clang++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\lab_1.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bin\lab_1.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liblab_1.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\lab_1.dir\linkLibs.rsp
